violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Wall/ceiling next to fryer in deli needs to be deep cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floor in meat dept needs repair, Paint peeling.
